ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents of the customer */,
  "monthly_income" REAL /* Monthly income of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Customer's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Customer's state */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Customer's zip code */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Customer's Social Security Number (encrypted) */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Customer's employment status */,
  "employment_duration_years" INTEGER /* Number of years employed */,
  "employment_company" TEXT /* Name of the company where the customer is employed */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Customer's credit score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_utilization" (
  "utilization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utilization record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "revolving_utilization" REAL /* Current revolving utilization ratio of unsecured credit lines */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Total credit limit of the unsecured lines of credit */,
  "current_balance" REAL /* Current balance on the unsecured lines of credit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the utilization record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the utilization record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utilization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_utilization_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "debt_ratios" (
  "debt_ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each debt ratio record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "debt_ratio" REAL /* Customer's debt-to-income ratio */,
  "total_debts" REAL /* Total amount of debts */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the debt ratio record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the debt ratio record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("debt_ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debt_ratios_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_lines_loans" (
  "credit_lines_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit lines record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "open_credit_lines" INTEGER /* Number of open credit lines and loans */,
  "total_credit_limit" REAL /* Total credit limit of all open credit lines and loans */,
  "total_balance" REAL /* Total balance on all open credit lines and loans */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the credit lines record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the credit lines record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_lines_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_lines_loans_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_history" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "late_30_days" INTEGER /* Number of late payments between 30-59 days */,
  "late_60_days" INTEGER /* Number of late payments between 60-89 days */,
  "late_90_days" INTEGER /* Number of late payments over 90 days */,
  "on_time_payments" INTEGER /* Number of on-time payments */,
  "total_payments" INTEGER /* Total number of payments */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_estate_loans" (
  "real_estate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real estate loan record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "real_estate_loans" INTEGER /* Number of real estate loans held by the customer */,
  "total_real_estate_loan_amount" REAL /* Total amount of real estate loans */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the real estate loan record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the real estate loan record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("real_estate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_estate_loans_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Calculated risk score based on financial data */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the risk assessment was performed */,
  "assessment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the risk assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the risk assessment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the risk assessment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer making the application */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan application was submitted */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Requested loan amount */,
  "loan_term_months" INTEGER /* Term of the loan in months */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "loan_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the loan application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the loan application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan application */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., Approved, Denied) */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the decision was made */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the decision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the status record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_status_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer whose data is accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
